surface_verification.justification: Pure compliance-verifier logic change (design_checks.py); no startable app/UI/API surface in the shipwright monorepo (the WebUI consumer is a separate repo reading audit JSON). Behaviour verified by shared/tests/test_verifiers_design.py (26) across both consumer flows + compliance Group-C adapters (49).

behaviors.behavior: AC1: adopted project (no 'design' in completed_steps) + FRs + no manifest -> check_design_fr_coverage SKIPs (not FAIL)
AC2: 'design' in completed_steps + FRs + no manifest -> FAILs (real drift, not skipped)
AC3: manifest present + orphan FR + 'design' not yet in completed_steps (validator flow) -> still FAILs on orphan (guard is manifest-gated, not top-level)
AC4: check_design_manifest_screens_exist stays strict -> still FAILs on missing manifest for a no-design project
AC5: existing behaviours unchanged (scope=library skip, orphan FAIL, no-FR trivial pass, malformed-config fail-loud) + detective-audit C1 consumer
behaviors.evidence: test_verifiers_design.py full file (26) PASSED; plugins/shipwright-compliance tests/test_audit_groups_c_f.py + test_audit_adapters.py (49) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC6a: BOM'd run_config parsed (scope=library and no-design both SKIP under a UTF-8 BOM)
AC6b: undecodable (non-UTF-8) run_config fails loud (no crash) -> FAIL
